reviewTrigger: proof, journey, command, provider, retention, or lifecycle change
transitionRule: A superseded packet retains its path and digest and names its successor and reason; evidence is never rewritten into standing provider truth.
defaultRouteRule: Only this index and the current contract route workers. Packets stay under packetRoot; retained detail stays under docs/evidence/verification/details/ and loads only by exact artifact path.
redactionRule: Packets and detail omit raw secrets, tokens, message/request bodies, phone numbers, full provider payloads, user-home paths, and unbounded output.
